MIT · AI for Science · Public Notes

Your Name

MIT rising senior · CADD-AI for Science researcher

I work on AI for science, computational drug discovery, and the engineering habits that make research sharper. This site collects my essays, public notes, projects, CV, and a small visual archive.

Read essays View CV

Highlights

  • MIT rising senior focused on AI for science and computational drug discovery.
  • CADD-AI for Science researcher: models, benchmarks, scientific reasoning, and reproducible workflows.
  • Writing publicly about papers, projects, taste, research process, and systems for getting better.
